comment: Sajtbyggaren OpenClaw action registry. OpenClaw is a conductor on the controlled engine, not a free agent. status: supported | partial | planned.

actions.note: Colour/font/theme -> brand/tone via theme_directives; compound colours via the stylist role + color_lexicon.
name/tagline/about/services via copyDirective; LLM-understood (copyDirectiveModel) with deterministic guards.

MOUNT-ONLY. Mounts a sanctioned section's capability + dossier via the apply chain (router section_add -> resolve type to capability with an implementing dossier -> apply requestedCapabilities + selectedDossiers.required -> targeted render -> new immutable version). Nine sanctioned types as of 2026-06-08 (commit 4c6ba67): team, faq, trust/guarantees, reviews, gallery, pricing, hours, location (map), contact-form. The soft dossiers are instructions-only, so a mounted section does NOT automatically render visibly (applied=true but appliedVisibleEffect=false); visible render + exact page/position placement is a separate render-path follow-up. Unknown/unsupported type (incl. hero/services/cta-banner) = honest no-op.
Reorder/move sections; needs an apply capability, not free CSS.
Read-only answer/critique from artifacts; never builds.
